title: Phantom CLS in Lighthouse: How to Hunt Down and Fix Invisible Layout Shifts
excerpt: A deep dive into identifying and resolving invisible Cumulative Layout Shifts (CLS) caused by lazy-loaded hero banners and render-blocking scripts.

title: Every Bug Is a Crime Scene: Why Great Developers Think Like Detectives
excerpt: Discover why the best developers aren't just walking encyclopedias, but detectives who gather evidence, recreate crime scenes, and solve mysteries.

title: Fixing Magento 2 Docker 502 Bad Gateway Error: Image Mismatch
excerpt: Learn how to troubleshoot and fix a 502 Bad Gateway error in a Magento 2 Docker environment caused by an Nginx and PHP-FPM image version mismatch.

title: Fixing Nginx "no port in upstream fastcgi_backend" Error in Magento Docker
excerpt: A deep dive into why the "no port in upstream fastcgi_backend" error occurs in modern Magento Docker setups and how to fix it by understanding dynamic Nginx routing.

title: How I Solved Invalid Configurable Product Filter Combinations in Magento 2 OpenSearch
excerpt: A technical deep dive into solving Magento 2 OpenSearch invalid filter combinations using custom indexing and query manipulation.

title: How a Cached Cloudflare 403 Response Masqueraded as a Magento Frontend Failure
excerpt: A deep dive into troubleshooting a strange Magento frontend issue that turned out to be a Cloudflare caching problem.

title: How a Magento 2 Upgrade Broke Our Multi-Website Setup
excerpt: A deep dive into troubleshooting a Magento 2 multi-website routing issue after an upgrade, and why the root cause was in the Nginx configuration.

title: Magento 2 Upgrade Issue: Missing setup Directory After an Interrupted Composer Install
excerpt: How an interrupted composer install can leave a Magento 2 project without a setup directory, and how to quickly fix it.

title: Exposing Local Docker Projects to the World with Cloudflare Tunnels
excerpt: Ditch ngrok and port forwarding. Learn how to securely expose your local Docker environments using Cloudflare Tunnels and a custom domain.
